summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of iOS 26 Liquid Glass Subtitle App completed successfully. All major features tested including glass effects, file upload, subtitle editor, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Home page loads with iOS 26 liquid glass design and gradient mesh background
Header with glass panel effect and logo functionality
Language selector dropdown works with multiple language options
File upload zone with glass effect and drag-drop support
Feature cards display with glass panels and hover effects
SRT file upload and parsing functionality
Subtitle editor view loads correctly with word cards
Play/pause button visible and functional in editor
Word editing functionality in subtitle cards
AI actions panel (Romanize, Find & Replace, AI Enhance buttons)
Reset functionality returns to home page
Glass hover effects work on all panels
Responsive design on mobile and tablet viewports
Accessibility features with proper test IDs
